nasb.text: Now when the centurion saw what had happened, he began praising God, saying, “Certainly this man was innocent.”

esv.text: Now when the centurion saw what had taken place, he praised God, saying, “Certainly this man was innocent!”

cnv.text: 百夫長看見所發生的事，就頌讚　神，說：“這真是個義人！”

ccb.text: 百夫长见此情形，便赞美上帝，说：“这人的确是个义人。”

csbs.text: 百夫长看见所发生的事，就不住地荣耀神，说：“这个人的确是义人。”
